content: By 2025, a generalist meta-learning memory consolidation agent can leverage the hierarchical curiosity signal filtering framework from open-ended agent design to spontaneously prune low-value episodic memories while consolidating high-surprise, task-generalizable memories, eliminating the need for hand-crafted memory pruning rules. This self-tuning consolidation mechanism allows the agent to adapt its memory retention strategy to new open-ended environments without retraining.
